description: CompositionBlack shorts made of 100% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, that has mesh insert on the back and on the inner leg seams, attached underwear, wide elasticated waistnd with drawstrings,swoosh logo embroidered on the left leg, manchester united seal appliqued on the right hemline and stripe detailing on the back of the short hemsFittingComfortWash careMachine was coldWash separately with like coloursDo not use softenersRemove immediatelyDo not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleach or dry clean cool iron Line dryPart of the 2010-11 home kit of the soccer team Manchester United, these polyester shorts from nike are designed for absolute comfort on the field and off it. The mesh inserts offer ample ventilation in the right places, while the elastic waistband sits snug on the waist.
